svg.aria-label: C919 E-TRAS 控制链路信号流图

text.data-tooltip: ATLTLA · At Landing Low TRA · PDF §1.1.1
LN1 · (atltla OR apwtla) AND mlg_wow AND NOT tr_inhibited
LN3 · eicu_cmd3 AND NOT over_temp AND tra < -11.74 AND NOT stowed_locked
LN4 · 7-term AND gate incl lock_unlock_confirmed + tr_deployed_confirmed + n1k_env + tr_wow + tra ≤ -14
LN5 · tra ≥ -11.74 AND n1k stow limit AND engine_running AND NOT deploy_cmd
